entities.name: Session State Manager
entities.context: Manages the session state and syncs metadata

entities.name: Conversation End
entities.context: Handles the closure of conversations and imports learnings

entities.name: Orchestrator
entities.context: Manages worker entries and approval processes

relationships.context: Both are parts of the conversation management process
Orchestrator uses the session state manager for workflow
Orchestrator integrates with Title Generator for title creation
Title Generator is part of the enrichment flow related to closing conversations
